title: FormatTemporalPlainDate<{gt}> — exclusive lower bound only
description: `Temporal.PlainDate` with an exclusive lower `gt` only; upper end is open
notes: Exclusive `gt`: the next day inside (2020-01-02) passes, but the boundary 2020-01-01 fails and so does the earlier 2019-12-31 — both invalid samples trip `gt`.
